ops.text: E8 ROUND 2 (Tinker/Qwen3-8B cells) TRAINED + JOURNALED (cells cell_8b_r16, cell_8b_r32): both peak at step 1950 of 2608 (mid-epoch-2, mirroring the local overfit pattern) — r32 best tinker AUC 0.9265, r16 0.9242; local-serve(final-step) 0.907/0.9107 with dropped=[]; $6.35 each (~$17 Tinker total). All beat local 4B E8(a) 0.9008 and v001 0.853. REMAINING to close E8: (1) download+serve each cell's step-1950 checkpoint locally (tinker_pilot's serve path, parameterized by checkpoint) and pick the winner by LOCAL AUC; (2) run drafts+evaluate on eval-v2 for the winner (needs run_e8 drafts/evaluate parameterized for base=mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit + adapter dir — currently hardcoded to the 4B); (3) WIDEN the judged corrective stratum (50 -> all ~123 corrective positives) so the promotion CI can separate from v001's degenerate [0,0]; (4) verdict.md + finalize + promotion decision; a promoted 8B needs registry metadata base_model=mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit render_version=2 and the daemon flip. E9 (task 7) follows the promotion decision.
